question:
Tax clearance warning from IRD

Anyone got this sms notification? “तपाईको विगत आर्थिक वर्षमा बार्षिक आय रू. ४० लाखभन्दा बढी देखिएको तर सो बमोजिम सम्बन्धित आय वर्षको डे-०४ विवरण पेश गर्नुपर्नेमा हालसम्म विवरण पेश गरेको नदेखिएकोले यथाशीघ्र पेश गर्नुहुन सुचित गरिन्छ। आन्तरिक राजस्व कार्यालय नँयाबानेश्वर सम्पर्कः ९८५१३३३५४३” it’s foreign income. What should be the next step?
rationale: Received an IRD non-filing warning SMS for foreign income and asks what the next compliance step is.

question:
Nepal ma honda crf 250L khojdai xu, paiyena, bidesh bata kanuni rupma kasari import garna sakiyela?

म नेपालभित्र Honda CRF 250 (विशेषगरी CRF250L / CRF250 Rally) खोज्दै छु। धेरै showroom/डिलरहरूमा सोधिसकें तर उपलब्ध छैन। त्यसैले अब India / Japan / UAE जस्ता देशबाट पूर्ण रूपमा कानुनी तरिकाले import गरेर नेपालमा Bluebook/number plate निकाल्ने सोचमा छु।

तर प्रक्रिया धेरै अलमलिएको छ। यहाँका अनुभवी दाइ/दिदी वा कसैले पहिले आफैंले/कम्पनीमार्फत import गरेको अनुभव छ भने, कृपया step-by-step मार्गदर्शन गरिदिनुहोस्।

मेरो मुख्य प्रश्नहरू (Step-by-step)

व्यक्तिले (individual) आफैं import गर्न मिल्छ कि अनिवार्य रूपमा registered importe्पनी चाहिन्छ?

Bike new र used मा प्रक्रिया/अनुमति फरक पर्छ? (used bike import allowed/blocked?)

विदेशमा bike किन्दा कुन कागजात अनिवार्य चाहिन्छ?

Invoice, Bill of Lading/Airway Bill, Packing list, Origin certificate, etc.?

नेपाल भन्सारमा (Customs) कुन कागजात देखाउनुपर्छ? र कसरी clearance हुन्छ? (Declaration/inspection/valuation)

CRF 250 (250cc) मा कर/शुल्क कुन-कुन लाग्छ? (Customs duty, VAT, excise आदि) — कहाँबाट official rate confirm गर्ने?

भन्सार कटेपछि DoTM/Transport Office मा registration गर्न के-के चाहिन्छ? Bluebook निकाल्ने process कस्तो हुन्छ?

“Recommendation letter / import permission” जस्तो केही चाहिन्छ कि? चाहिन्छ भने कहाँ/कसरी apply गर्ने?

Payment & logistics: Shipping (sea/ai) गर्दा practical रूपमा कुन route/agent ठीक हुन्छ?

Red flags: कुन-कुन कुरा भए नकिन्ने/नलाग्ने? (stolen bike risk, forged papers, VIN mismatch आदि)
rationale: Detailed step-by-step question on legally importing a motorcycle from abroad including customs clearance, DoTM registration, Bluebook issuance, import permissions, and applicable duty/VAT/excise rates.

question:
How a person who bought phone 3-4 years back is by supposed to have a purchase bill?

आज मिति २०७९ भाद्र ३० गतेसम्म विदेशबाट व्यक्तिगत तवरले ल्याईएका मोबाइल सेट लगायत आजको मितिसम्म चालु रहेका सबै मोबाइल सेटहरु स्वतः MDMS प्रणालीमा दर्ता हुने व्यवस्था मिलाईएको छ।२०७९ भाद्र ३० पश्चात मोबाइल खरिद गर्दा उक्त मोबाइल सेट नेपाल दूरसञ्चार प्राधिकरणको MDMS प्रणाली (mdms.nta.gov.np) मा दर्ता भए/नभएको एकिन गरी मात्र खरिद गर्नु हुन अनुरोध छ।

Nepal Telecom Authority - MDMS (nta.gov.np)
rationale: User is questioning how to comply with MDMS mobile registration requirements when a purchase bill for an older phone is unavailable — a procedural question about NTA/gov.np compliance.

question:
Tried opening Tms/Demat account. Kyc rejected multiple times, branch visit required. Yo kyc kasari pass garne?

Guys, I’ve finally decided to start share trading. Sathi haru sabai le garirako dekhera malai pani excitement aayo, so I downloaded a broker app and started the TMS + Demat account opening.

Online ma sab milcha bhanthyo; took citizenship photo clear, selfie, digital signature, ani bank link pani garey. 5 choti try garisake last few days ma because every time "document not clear" or "face mismatch" or "retry" bhanera reject huncha.

Finally euta time "verified" bhayo green tick aayo. Khushi bhayera paisa deposit garna lagyo, tara message: "Activation pending. Visit branch with original citizenship and physical signature."

Bhai yo k ho?? Online ma sab thik bhaisakepachi pani branch ma line basnu parne? 
Malai ta wakka lagisakyo. Trading garna mann thiyo, aba yo KYC BS le excitement nai udyo.

Kasari fully online TMS/Demat kholcha guys? Kasaiko broker le sachchai no-branch process dincha ki sabai yestai loophole ho? Suggestion dinu na please, ma aba cash ma nai rakhchu ki kya ho.

Rant over, tara serious dukha ho :"(
rationale: Asks how to complete KYC and open a TMS/Demat account online under SEBON-regulated broker process without a branch visit.

question:
TU credit transfer एउटा help चाहियो

सबैजनालाई नमस्कार, एउटा help चाहियो 🙏

म अहिले US मा पढ्दै छु। यसअघि मैले ASCOL मा BIT को एक semester पढेको थिएँ, र त्यहाँका केही courses transfer गर्नका लागि TU बाट gradesheet/transcript चाहिएको छ।

Problem के छ भने, मसँग अहिले gradesheet छैन, ASCOL मा पनि भेटिएन। धेरै समय भइसकेकोले मैले लिएको थिएँ कि हरायो थाहा छैन।

मसँग भएका details:
citizenship, passport, personal details, symbol number

नभएका:
registration number

म नेपालमा छैन, त्यसैले मेरो sister लाई पठाएर process गर्न चाहन्छु।

के कसैले guide गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ? Is there any specific process?
के sister ले मेरो behalf मा TU बाट transcript निकाल्न मिल्छ? symbol number ले मात्रै पुग्छ? TU ले direct US college मा email/send गर्न सक्छ?

Any help would mean a lot 🙏
rationale: Asks how to obtain a TU transcript via a proxy representative with incomplete registration details, a concrete gov-institution procedure question.

question:
Question about Basai Sarai (Migration and Citizenship Update in Nepal

If someone is currently living in Municipality A, District A, and they migrate to Municipality B, District B, how does the citizenship (नागरिकता) update work? 

- Can the address on the citizenship certificate be updated at the District Office in District B? Or is it not possible to change it? 

- If it can be updated, what’s the process? Do we need to wait a certain number of years after migration, or can we directly apply for an updated citizenship copy (नागरिकता प्रतिलिपि) at District Office B once we have the migration certificate?
rationale: Asks step-by-step how to update citizenship address after inter-district migration (Basai Sarai) and whether a pratilipi can be issued at the destination district office.

question:
Anyone experiencing suitation like mine

Hey There,

Are there anyone experiencing suitation like mine. Almost 40 days ago passport renewal ko lagi deko thiya at kathmandu cdo, I thought 30 days ma ta aaehalcha kina urgent ma dinu but aaja 40 days bho aako chaina. Status check garda is being printed vancha sadai. 

KTM CDO ko passport receive garne jhal ma ni gayara sodiyo two weeks ma ta aaunu parne ho but I can’t say for sure vanche. Ani feri ekchin pachi vanin hajur lai urgent vaya urgent ma gayara feri form varnus from tripuresor. 

K garnu hola feri form varnu ki kurnu aajhai ?

Ko ko chan nov 9,10 tira renew ko lagi dine ani sms still napaune ? K garne b4 cha share garam. Feri yo miraj ki ko ho feri andolon garchu vancha feri jalaune ta hoina k ho kuro k garam hola 

UAE janu parne aafno

Scooter (Vespa) ma scratch/dent aako cha, rider lai khasai kei bhayena jasto cha. Repair cost lagbhag 20k NPR bhanchan (body, seat, front bar). Traffic le mero license ra bill book liyeko cha.

Mero full insurance cha, tara police case ma jana mann chaina.

Yo cost reasonable ho? Ra yo situation ma private milayera settle garda thik huncha ki k garda better hola?

question:
Bro that's fucking harassment
Aile strong stance liyera jail pathaouna sakiyena vane (don't be offended) worst case scenario ma rape huna sakxa
Mero suggestion linxau vane 1st ma police case gara ani company lai pani complain gara sakke samma jail pathou
Ghar pariwar ra sathi haru bata tyo kasto manxe ho vanne kura nalukau
Completely delete all social media and change sim cards rw selective people lai matra number deu and make a new one if you like ani privacy setting ma kosaile navettaoune gari rakha
Sakke samma tyo thou xodera kunai relative or friend ko ghar ma base hunxa also self defense move haru sikha ani euta knife jahile usanga rakha vana (just to be safe)
Kahile pani galli or manxe kam hidne bato bata nahidnu and sakke samma sathi or private vehicle or public bus nai use garnu
